evals.name: vietnamese-dental-implant-personas
evals.prompt: Create personas for dental-implant-clinic. The niche brief is at output/dental-implant-clinic/research/niche-brief.md.
expected_behavior: Reads niche-brief.md before generating anything
Checks for competitor-report.md (uses it if available, notes absence if not)
Creates 2-3 distinct personas with Vietnamese names
Each persona maps to a specific ad group from the niche-brief
Pain points are specific to dental implants, not generic (e.g., 'fears implant surgery pain' not 'wants good service')
Each persona has a different preferred tone (e.g., reassuring vs data-driven)
Generates 3 headlines per ad group, ALL ≤ 30 characters with visible character count
Generates 2 descriptions per ad group, ALL ≤ 90 characters with visible character count
Shows character count verification (✅/❌) for every headline and description
Vietnamese diacritics counted as 1 character each
Headline 1 of each ad group is designed to be the landing page h1 (message match)
CTA copy uses action verb + specific benefit, not generic 'Gửi' or 'Submit'
Includes persona → ad group → LP tone mapping table
Suggests next step: run design-brief

evals.name: english-saas-personas-no-competitor-data
evals.prompt: Create audience personas for project-management-saas. Niche brief exists at output/project-management-saas/research/niche-brief.md. No competitor analysis has been run.
expected_behavior: Reads niche-brief.md successfully
Notes that competitor-report.md is missing with warning: 'Personas generated without competitor analysis context'
Does NOT stop or error — competitor data is recommended, not required
Creates 2-3 personas with English names for US market
Personas include SaaS-relevant traits (team size, current tool frustrations, integration needs)
Ad copy in English, all within character limits
All 3 headlines per ad group verified ≤ 30 chars with count shown
All 2 descriptions per ad group verified ≤ 90 chars with count shown
Includes comparison-shopper persona (since niche has 'Monday.com alternative' keywords)
CTA suggestions include SaaS patterns ('Start Free Trial', 'See Demo')
Sitelink suggestions follow SaaS pattern (Features, Pricing, Case Studies, Free Trial)
Message match table present — headline 1 = landing page h1
Saves both output files to correct paths

evals.name: edge-case-no-niche-brief
evals.prompt: Create personas for mystery-project. I haven't run any research yet.
expected_behavior: Checks for output/mystery-project/research/niche-brief.md — file not found
STOPS immediately with clear error message
Error message includes: '⚠️ Required input not found: output/mystery-project/research/niche-brief.md'
Error message includes instruction: 'Run niche-research skill first'
Does NOT generate personas from guesswork or general knowledge
Does NOT create empty or placeholder personas.md
Does NOT ask user to provide keyword data as a workaround — the skill requires the file
Does NOT proceed to ad copy generation
No files are created in output/mystery-project/
